root_cause: Node resource pressure escalated into kubelet eviction cascade
evidence: Eviction event message indicates node resource pressure

causes.message: Node reports active pressure condition(s): MemoryPressure
Sustained node pressure escalated into kubelet-driven eviction
Pod was evicted after node pressure crossed kubelet thresholds

pod:pressure-evicted-pod: Evicted event observed after node pressure activation
The node was low on resource: memory. Threshold quantity: 100Mi, available: 42Mi. Container app was using 512Mi, request is 128Mi.
